headline: FLOOR-LIMITED CONFIRMATION (Night 7). Composite 0 holds at floor. New in-window evidence: Al Jazeera April 27 — Sudan Doctors Network reports 1,470+ civilians + 907 military + 20 doctors held in dire RSF detention conditions in el-Fasher; cholera outbreak since February; ethnic-targeted torture/execution. UN Independent Fact-Finding Mission's February 2026 'hallmarks of genocide' finding remains the institutional anchor. April 28 Security Council added new Sudan sanctions designations under Resolution 1591. Floor entity — accumulating evidence cannot be expressed via composite movement.

evidence.finding: Sudan Doctors Network: 1,470+ civilians, 907 military personnel, 20 doctors held in dire RSF detention; cholera outbreak since February; ethnic-targeted torture/execution.

UN Independent Fact-Finding Mission: evidence establishes at least 3 underlying acts of genocide; ethnically targeted killings, widespread sexual violence, enforced disappearances; coordinated campaign of destruction against non-Arab communities.
Security Council added new designations under Resolution 1591 Sudan sanctions regime (April 28).

World failing Sudan as war enters fourth year; UN Humanitarian Coordinator: 'I'm referring to this as an abandoned crisis.' 34M require humanitarian assistance; 2026 $2.8B response plan only 16% funded.
65% of population in urgent need; ~400,000 dead estimate; 14M displaced; 61.7% acutely food insecure; child casualties up sharply Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025.

methodologyNote: FLOOR-LIMITATION METHODOLOGY GAP — Sudan at composite 0. New evidence (el-Fasher detention, cholera outbreak, Q1 2026 child casualty data, UN Security Council April 28 designations) cannot be expressed via composite movement. Recommend dedicated methodology development cycle for floor cluster.
